steps: Go to https://openrouteservice.org/dev/#/signup to create a free account
Fill in your name, email, and intended use case
Verify your email address via the confirmation email
Go to the 'TOKENS' section on the dashboard
Click 'Request a token' at the bottom of the page
Enter a name for the token and select the 'Free' plan

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your OpenRouteService API key (token), sent in the Authorization header

notes: Free tier available with 2,000 daily requests for most endpoints
Built on OpenStreetMap data — open source and free to use
Rate limits on the free plan: 40 requests/minute for directions
Higher limits available on paid plans
API key is passed in the Authorization header (no 'Bearer' prefix)

test_endpoint.description: Check the API health status to verify the service is reachable
